question: Mujhe kaun sa ratna pehenna chahiye taaki paisa aaye? DOB 9 Sept 1988, 4:20 AM, Nagpur.
response:
Namaste! Aapka janm kundali ke hisaab se, paisa aur samriddhi ke liye Mangal aur Shani ka prabhav bahut mahatvapurn hota hai. Aapke liye optional tor par, aap "Yellow Sapphire" (Pukhraj) pehan sakte hain, kyunki ye Guru (Jupiter) ka ratna hai jo dhan aur samriddhi ko badhawa deta hai. 

Lekin, ratna pehnne se pehle kisi achhe Vedic astrologer se milkar apna kundali ka vistar se parikshan karana bahut zaruri hai, taaki sahi ratna aur unka upyog samajh sakein. 

Saath hi, paisa aane ke liye apni mehnat, dhairya aur acchi planning par bhi dhyan dena zaruri hota hai. Agar financial advice chahiye, to kisi qualified expert se salah mashwara karna bhi behtar hota hai.

Aapke sukh aur samriddhi ki kamna karta hoon!

question: I feel completely lost about what to do with my life. Can my chart tell me my purpose? Born 17 June 1993, 2:05 PM, Kolkata.
response:
Thank you for sharing your birth details. I understand feeling lost can be really challenging, and your chart can offer some gentle guidance.

Born on June 17, 1993, in Kolkata at 2:05 PM, your Sun is in Gemini, which points to a curious, adaptable nature. Gemini energy often thrives on learning, communication, and versatility. With your Moon and Ascendant placements, there may be a natural inclination towards connecting deeply with others and expressing yourself.

While astrology doesn’t define a fixed “purpose,” it highlights strengths and inclinations. You might find fulfillment exploring areas where you can engage your mind, share ideas, or help others through communication.

If you’re feeling stuck, consider journaling or speaking to a counselor who can help you reflect on what truly resonates with you beyond external expectations.

Would you like me to look at specific planetary placements or suggest supportive practices to nurture clarity?

question: Sarkari naukri kab tak lag jayegi? Bahut try kar raha hun par nahi ho raha.
response:
Samajh sakta hoon aapki mehnat aur utsah. Sarkari naukri milne ka samay kai baaton par nirbhar karta hai, jaise aapka kundli mein grahon ki sthiti, aapke abhyas ka fal, aur bhagya. Aapka lagan aur satat prayas bahut mahatvapurna hai.

Vedik drishti se, shubh grah dasha aur yog kabhi kabhi samay badal sakta hai, lekin aap apne skills ko aur majboot karein, interview aur prashanik gyan par focus karein. Dhairya rakhein, sahi samay par avsar zarur milenge.

Aap apni kundli dekhan chahte hain to mujhe janam tithi, samay aur sthal bata sakte hain. Saath hi, chintit ho toh career counselor ya experts se salah lena bhi labhdayak rahega. Aapka safar shubh ho!
